tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file in the workspace. Use this to examine file contents when answering questions about the code.
tools.usage:
read_file(path="src/utils/helpers.ts")
Optionally specify line ranges: read_file(path="src/utils/helpers.ts", startLine=10, endLine=50)

path.description: Relative path to the file from workspace root (e.g., src/utils/helpers.ts, README.md)

endLine.description: Optional: 1-based ending line number (inclusive). Only used if startLine is also specified.
